title: Segmentation fault during OOB access to real array

features.name: out_of_bounds_access_to_real_array
features.description: Code should include an out-of-bounds array access to a real-typed unpacked array where the index exceeds the array bounds

features.name: real_array_element_assignment_via_assign
features.description: Code should include assigning values to individual elements of a real-typed unpacked array using continuous assignment statements
